arts.ttl: Jack Grealish 'racks up £5,000 bar bill and copies Wolf of Wall Street gesture as Man City star parties in swanky London nightclub' - after playing just three minutes in Crystal Palace win
arts.sum: Grealish was given just a three-minute cameo at the Etihad Stadium on Saturday and headed down to the capital the following day for a big night out on the tiles.

arts.ttl: Man Utd dressing room accused of committing ultimate sin after Newcastle thrashing
arts.sum: Manchester United were beaten 4-1 by Newcastle on Sunday afternoon, with Nicky Butt accusing the players of failing to show they care during the defeat

arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs. Crystal Palace: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Wednesday's Premier League clash between Newcastle and Crystal Palace, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Newcastle issue statement as Eddie Howe is diagnosed with pneumonia
arts.sum: Jason Tindall and Graeme Jones will lead Newcastle in Eddie Howe’s absence

arts.ttl: Report: Palace through to PL2 play-off phase despite Chelsea defeat
arts.sum: Crystal Palace Under-21s’ seven-game unbeaten run came to an end at the hands of London rivals Chelsea at Sutton United’s VBS Community Stadium, though the side have secured their place in the Premier League 2 play-off phase.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United predicted XI vs. Crystal Palace: Possible starting lineup as Magpies face Eddie Howe, Anthony Gordon dilemma
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Newcastle United could line up for Wednesday's Premier League clash against Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace predicted XI vs. Newcastle United: Possible starting lineup as Oliver Glasner receives Marc Guehi boost
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Crystal Palace could line up for Wednesday's Premier League clash against Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Preview: Newcastle United vs. Crystal Palace - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Premier League clash between Newcastle United and Crystal Palace, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry blasts Man United player for doing something he's 'never seen before' - as Jamie Carragher compares them to under-FIVES for goal conceded against Newcastle
arts.sum: Thierry Henry has blasted a Manchester United player for his reaction after Harvey Barnes ' second goal on Sunday. Carragher claimed United's defending would be 'unacceptable' in primary school.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher makes fresh Chelsea prediction with bold Newcastle verdict
arts.sum: Newcastle have gained the upper hand over Chelsea following the weekend's action and Eddie Howe's side are on track to pip Enzo Maresca's men to Champions League qualification
